ai_instructions.read_input_from: Always read source XML from xml_data_path. This is the authoritative input file and should NOT be overwritten unless you are explicitly asked to restore it to a prior state.
ai_instructions.write_output_to: Always save transformed XML to output_dir. Never save output XML back to xml_data_path without explicit user confirmation.
ai_instructions.save_xslt_to: Save every XSLT stylesheet you generate to xslt_dir using the naming convention YYYY-MM-DD-description.xsl (e.g. 2026-04-09-syllabubFix.xsl). Include a comment header in each file noting the date, authors, purpose, input, and output.
ai_instructions.schema_resolution: To find the correct schema for validation, first read the xml-model processing instruction from the XML document (processing-instruction('xml-model')) and extract its href attribute. Resolve that href as a relative URI against the document's base-uri() to get the absolute schema path. Only fall back to xml_schema_path from this config if no xml-model processing instruction is present in the document.
ai_instructions.validation: After any transformation, validate the output file using the schema resolved from the document's xml-model processing instruction (see schema_resolution) and report results.
ai_instructions.reload_after_disk_write: The MCP server holds the source document in memory. After saving a file to disk, call reload_document if you need subsequent tool calls to operate on the updated on-disk version.
